headline: Boston Scientific Bets on WATCHMAN to Drive Structural Heart Growth
summary: WATCHMAN's 19% growth and trial wins bolster Boston Scientific's push to expand its addressable market from 5M to 20M patients worldwide.

raw.headline: Boston Scientific Bets on WATCHMAN to Drive Structural Heart Growth
raw.summary: WATCHMAN's 19% growth and trial wins bolster Boston Scientific's push to expand its addressable market from 5M to 20M patients worldwide.

headline: Abbott showcases expanding evidence across its cancer diagnostics portfolio at ASCO 2026
summary: Abbott (NYSE: ABT) will present 11 abstracts featuring new evidence across the cancer care continuum at the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting, taking place May 29 – June 2, 2026, in Chicago. The presentations showcase the breadth of Abbott's integrated cancer diagnostics portfolio and demonstrate how its tests support critical decision points—from identifying risk and detecting disease earlier to guiding treatment and monitoring for recurrence.

headline: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Slid on Headwinds in Nutrition Business
summary: Diamond Hill Capital, a First Eagle Investment Management company, issued its Q1 2026 investor letter for its “Large Cap Strategy”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Strategy declined 2.39% (net of fees), trailing the Russell 1000 Value Index’s 2.10%. headline: Anthony Pompliano Says The Cheaper Stocks Become, The More People Yell 'Bubble'
summary: Anthony Pompliano pushed back against bubble fears, arguing that current stock valuations remain far below the extremes seen during the dot-com era despite the market's record rally.

headline: Best Dividend Kings: May 2026
summary: Dividend growth among Kings accelerated to 3.71%, with notable increases from W.W. Grainger, Parker-Hannifin, and RLI Corp. Read more on Dividend Kings here.
